link_location: All service pages (health-insurance/retirement/life-insurance/critical-illness) appear only in nav and footer. They do not heavily cross-link to blog posts covering their topics. Most blog posts lack internal links back to service pages.

Local landing pages (/medicare-broker-miami etc.) are in sitemap.ts but NOT in the main Header navigation or Footer Quick Links — they receive internal links ONLY from the sitemap and potentially from each other's content.
The /tools/* pages appear only in the Header Learn dropdown and sitemap — not linked from any service pages or blog posts contextually.
FAQ pages (/resources/faq/*) are linked from /resources index page only — not contextually linked from related blog posts or service pages.
